name: Saltwater Brand Bucket
description: Brand voice, customer archetype, winning ad patterns, SKU catalog, and performance-tagged hooks for Saltwater Clothing Co. Read by the Saltwater AI Ads Hook Generator agent. Versioned by SHA-256 hash per generation (see PRD §6.4).

files.name: voice.md
files.purpose: Voice IS / IS NOT, vocabulary IN / OUT, tone rules, founder voice, anti-patterns, trademark rules

files.name: customer.md
files.purpose: "Older Joe DeMarco" archetype — demographics, personality, lifestyle, buying triggers, hooks that resonate / fall flat

files.name: winning-patterns.md
files.purpose: Three proven ad patterns (Founder Story, Problem-Solution, Limited Drops), confirmed library examples, hook templates, visual brand DNA

files.name: products.json
files.purpose: SKU catalog — id, name, category, season, key claims, photo refs, winning ad refs

files.name: hooks-winners.jsonl
files.purpose: Append-only log of hooks that scaled (>2x ROAS) — one JSON per line, written by Brand Bucket Manager F-BBM-4 from TW data

files.name: hooks-losers.jsonl
files.purpose: Append-only log of hooks that flopped (<0.5x ROAS) — one JSON per line, written by Brand Bucket Manager F-BBM-4 from TW data

earn_it_gate: Month 6: ≥30 winners with TW attribution AND ≥10 losers with reasons AND demonstrably better Hook Generator output with bucket priming vs without. Until then, this is a useful prompt context library, not a moat. See PRD §10.4.
